meaning: n.正式请求,申请,需要,命令,征用,通知单vt.征用,要求
examples: The imposition of a military base involved the requisition of native lands for both the fort and the territory needed to feed and exercise the soldiers' animals.
The requisition port can use any class to define its type.
The requisition phase is implemented by the following method.
And did they get up and go requisition a new winter cape after the stewed eel?
In New York, doctors have to requisition special paper in order to file their claims.
